content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective self-refinement system that still retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning. This hybrid approach addresses a key unspoken limitation of vanilla Self-Refine: it gets stuck in local optima because it only refines along the same initial line of reasoning it started from.
